amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 2 — paragraph 5 e (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 2 — paragraph 5 e (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

5e. This Regulation shall not apply to AI components provided under free and open-source licences except to the extent they are placed on the market or put into service by a provider as part of a high-risk AI system or of an AI system that falls under Title II or IV. This exemption shall not apply to foundation models as defined in Art 3.
parliament_text: 5e. This Regulation shall not apply to AI components provided under free and open-source licences except to the extent they are placed on the market or put into service by a provider as part of a high-risk AI system or of an AI system that falls under Title II or IV. This exemption shall not apply to foundation models as defined in Art 3.
